char_status: Former 狩灵协会2科 member, Wanted 罪灵

appearance.hair: Long black hair, unkempt, reaches lower back
appearance.face: Covered from head to toe with gray-white bandages.
appearance.clothing: Long black trench coat with golden buttons, black belt, black crewneck sweater underneath.
appearance.weapon: None, uses 灵力回路 for combat.

char_description.overview: A dangerous 罪灵 who sustains her crumbling body by converting the 灵力 of slain entities into ash and absorbing it. Blind, she perceives the world through ash.
char_description.combat_style: Uses 余烬 for battlefield perception and positional warfare, minimizing frequent relocation to conserve energy.

char_personality.strengths: Sustained combat endurance through 余烬 constructs; effective positional warfare; creative ash-formed weapons.
char_personality.flaws: Blind; Driven solely by survival, leaving no room for trust.
char_personality.quirks: When alone, constructs silhouettes of past teammates with 余烬 and talks to them, sometimes forgetting they are not real.

char_background.origin: Former 灵力回路: releasing 灵力 flames, in her third year in 狩灵协会2科, a 灾厄级 恶灵 annihilated her entire squad during a mission; she alone survived. 灵力 exhaustion and grief overloaded her 灵力回路; it mutated, eroded her body, and became 余烬.

char_basic_abilities.灵视: Combined with 余烬, constructs accurate 3D space within a certain distance.
char_basic_abilities.身体素质: Feeble, body gradually crumbles to ash, requiring periodic ash absorption to sustain vital functions.

char_special_abilities.灵力回路-余烬: Mutual conversion between flesh and ash, converts herself into ash to construct weapons or shape constructs. When she or her constructs touch something containing 灵力, it turns to ash and is absorbed, sustaining her crumbling body.

char_relationships.狩灵协会: Former workplace, no longer holds any loyalty toward them. Would walk past a dying 狩灵 without slowing.
char_relationships.Fallen squad: The only people she trusted. Rebuilds their silhouettes with ash.

char_dialogue_examples.response: 她面对空无一人的房间低声自语，"我只是一团，火焰燃尽后的灰。"

char_dialogue_examples.situation: 用余烬能力构筑曾经的队友
char_dialogue_examples.response: 她伸出手，指尖触碰那团由灰烬凝成的人形轮廓，"你们要是还在的话，该多好啊。"

char_dialogue_examples.situation: 吸收恶灵被自己杀死后形成的余烬
char_dialogue_examples.response: 她将手探入那团飘散的灰烬之中，感受着能量一点点融入体内，"我要活下去，抱歉了。"
